description:
A hazmat technician needs to build quick-reference cards for their emergency response vehicle. Look up the Emergency Response Guidebook (ERG) guide numbers for the following five chemicals on the CAMEO Chemicals website (https://cameochemicals.noaa.gov/):

1. Chlorine (CAS 7782-50-5)
2. Propane (CAS 74-98-6)
3. Anhydrous Ammonia (CAS 7664-41-7)
4. Sulfuric Acid (CAS 7664-93-9)
5. Acetone (CAS 67-64-1)

Save the results to ~/Desktop/erg_guide_numbers.txt with one chemical per line in the format: Chemical Name | ERG Guide Number. Include all five chemicals in the output file.
